description: Style NoteLook sporty over the weekend with this rugged look polo t-shirt from indian terrain. The athletic colour is a classic and will never go out of style. Wear this luxurious soft piece with everything from denims to neutral shorts to create the perfect casual aura.Product DetailsBlue polo t-shirt that has a spread collar, rugged half buttoned placket, short sleeves with tipped, ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
